# Support

If you need help using EazyCMP, use the following options.

---

## Documentation

Read README.md first.

Most questions are already answered there.

---

## GitHub Issues

For bugs or feature requests:

open an issue:

https://github.com/yourusername/eazycmp/issues

---

## Discussions

Ask questions in discussions:

https://github.com/yourusername/eazycmp/discussions

---

## Email Support

For private questions:

ajay.swami.dev@gmail.com

---

## Response time

Typically:

24 - 48 hours

---

## Before asking for help

Please include:

library version
platform
code snippet
error logs

This helps resolve issues faster.
